## Fit with the Pack Thesis

<!-- Ribbit Survival is Productive Frogs + a lean tech spine (AE2, Powah) + a
     curated content/QoL layer, in a normal survival world. Does your idea fit
     the v0.x scope, or is it a later-version stretch? -->

- [ ] Fits current scope (PF loop, tech spine, QoL)
- [ ] Belongs in a later version (after the pack is feature-complete)
- [ ] Belongs in [productive-frogs](https://github.com/Flatts3000/productive-frogs) - this needs Java
- [ ] Not sure - maintainer please advise
